svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 156, 1), rgb(237, 237, 237));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));
